memory:memory/2026-05-05.md:1:42.snippet: # Memory Log - May 5, 2026 ## Life by Design Summit - Completed Work ### Landing Page Created - URL: https://life-by-design-summit.vercel.app - 14 sections with LifeCharter branding - Mobile responsive design - 3 confirmed speakers: Babs (Host), Turiya (Co-Host), John Carter - 11 placeholder speaker spots ### Registration System - Registration Page: https://life-by-design-summit.vercel.app/register.html - Thank You Page: https://life-by-design-summit.vercel.app/thank-you.html - Payment Success Page: https://life-by-design-summit.vercel.app/payment-success.html - 3 registration tiers: Free, Next Chapter Pass, Integration Pass ($197) - Stripe payment link integrated: https://buy.stripe.com/
